fresh_user_hero_path: Playwright runtime report uses fresh context browser runs for /campaigns/zk-builder-microgrant across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, and Pixel 7.
public_access: Guest public access requires no login, no builder account, and no wallet for receipt replay; claiming uses a client-side testnet signer created in the browser.
reset_or_seed_strategy: Each claim run creates an isolated client signer and receipt id; fresh browser contexts reset IndexedDB state, while duplicate-claim behavior is scoped by nullifier.
abuse_limits: Per-session testnet signer and one-claim nullifier limit cap repeat claims; Friendbot/testnet spend is isolated from custody and mainnet value.
second_context_or_role_proof: The runtime report includes a second context public receipt viewer case for /receipts/not-yet-created and a Return to campaign recovery path.
support_contact_or_failure_state: Failure states cover proof rejection, already-claimed receipts, tx failed receipts, missing receipt recovery, and retry through the campaign route.
